result.stdout:
Usage:
    prjpacker pack <path/to/project/directory> <outputMetadataFileName>
    prjpacker unpack <path/to/metadata/file> <path/to/output/directory>

`pack` includes all files except files excluded by the target directory's root .gitignore, if present.
The .git directory is always excluded.
